NAME

rate_limit_config_t - Rate limit configuration.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/rate_limit/rate_limit.h>

Data Fields


uint32_t max_events
Maximum events allowed. uint32_t window_secs
Time window in seconds.

Detailed Description

Rate limit configuration.
